entity.summary: Solana decentralized exchange supporting swaps across SPL and Token-2022 assets, liquidity provision and management, advanced limit orders, trading signals and automation features, and developer swap and pool APIs.
entity.notes: Duplicate FluxBeam discovery rows are consolidated into one Solana DEX entity. Current first-party documentation identifies FluxBeam as a Solana DEX supporting SPL, SPL404, and Token-2022 assets and documents swap, liquidity, limit-order, automation, and API functions.

evidence.title: About FluxBeam
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies FluxBeam as a decentralized exchange on Solana and documents support for SPL, SPL404, and Token-2022 assets, alongside swap, liquidity, limit-order, automation, and API sections.

evidence.title: How to Swap
evidence.notes: Current first-party swap guide documents active Solana-token swap execution, wallet connection, quote review, and transaction confirmation.

evidence.title: How to Provide Liquidity
evidence.notes: First-party liquidity documentation describes current liquidity provisioning and management across Solana token pairs, including two-sided and single-sided liquidity behavior.
